headline: Oracle Stock Tumbles on Higher Capex and Equity Raise - Shorting ORCL Puts Works
summary: Oracle Corp. stock fell after its June 10 earnings release, even as operating cash flow rose from negative free cash flow. It also projects 25% higher capex next fiscal year, and a $20 billion equity raise.

raw.headline: Oracle Stock Tumbles on Higher Capex and Equity Raise - Shorting ORCL Puts Works
raw.summary: Oracle Corp. stock fell after its June 10 earnings release, even as operating cash flow rose from negative free cash flow. It also projects 25% higher capex next fiscal year, and a $20 billion equity raise.

headline: Nvidia, Oracle, and Now SpaceX Are Borrowing Billions Amid the AI Boom. Is This a Warning Sign?
summary: A record rush to raise cash is bankrolling the AI build-out. But the companies tapping the market aren't all in the same financial shape.
